descriptions.text: Inkwell is a mystery-puzzle-roguelike with permanent and per-run upgrades, characters to unlock, and a compelling mystery to unveil! It is a rom hack of Pokémon Emerald by DizzyEgg and Unfolding. As a "Rom Haiku" by Unfolding, it is a shorter experience then the standard "Eight Gyms" Pokémon rom hacks.
